name: 5 MG Olanazapine Tablets IP
about: 5 MG Olanazapine Tablets IP is a type of general medicine that is widely used to treat various mental health conditions such as schizophrenia and bipolar disorder. It contains 5 mg of Olanzapine, an active ingredient that belongs to the class of antipsychotic drugs. This medication is manufactured in India and comes in a pack of 10*10 tablets. The recommended dosage of this medicine should be taken as per the doctors advice. It is crucial to store this medicine in a dry and cool place away from direct sunlight to maintain its effectiveness. These tablets are available in the form of easy-to-swallow tablets, making it convenient for patients to take their medication as prescribed.
